events.label: reasoning
events.text:
We need answer JSON only. Need evaluate described field condition. Scenario: field photo for pressure testing paired with cropped sheet excerpt. Title block, revision, matching callout not visible, so installed condition cannot be tied to controlling page. Reference ASME B31.3 §345. Need decide pass/fail/needs_more_info. Since cannot tie installed condition to controlling page, documentation incomplete. For pressure testing commercial project governed by codes, submittals, third-party inspections, need verify test is per approved drawings/documents. If title block/revision/callout not visible, cannot confirm. But is that fail or needs more info? The task says compare work against controlling document. Since cannot tie to controlling page, likely needs_more_info. However if work is dangerous or non-compliant, decision must be fail. Is there evidence of dangerous/non-compliant? Not visible; only documentation issue. Could be fail due to lack of traceability? Need decide. Let's parse required fields.

decision: likely "needs_more_info" because title block, revision, matching callout not visible, installed condition cannot be tied to controlling page. Risk maybe medium due to inability to verify pressure test against design and code. work_stage tested/inspected. percent_complete maybe 90? value 0. sound_source irrelevant. confidence maybe 0.6. event_time 0, rate 0, order empty, workable empty. findings: ["Sheet excerpt lacks title block, revision, and callout; cannot verify tested piping against controlling document", "Pressure test documentation traceability incomplete"]. actions: ["Provide complete drawing sheet with title block, revision, and callout matching the installed piping", "Verify test pressure, duration, and acceptance criteria per ASME B31.3 §345 and approved submittals"]. rationale: brief. references: ["ASME B31.3 §345", "Project submittals and third-party inspection requirements"].

Need ensure JSON valid. No prose outside.

    "Confirm test pressure, hold time, and acceptance criteria comply with ASME B31.3 §345 and approved submittals",
    "Have the test record reviewed and signed off by the inspector of record"
  ],
  "rationale": "The pressure test cannot be validated against the controlling document because the cropped sheet excerpt lacks the title block, revision, and callout needed to link the installed work to the approved design. Without that traceability, pass/fail cannot be confirmed.",

    "Project submittals and third-party inspection requirements"
  ]
